raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's existing state laws and regulations will make it impossible for many fire victims to rebuild.",
    "The California Coastal Act requires projects to be reviewed by the California Coastal Commission, which is notoriously slow and anti-housing.",
    "State and local laws require a wide range of upgrades that will spike rebuilding costs and lead to significant delays.",
    "Inadequate funding and staffing of the LA Fire Department contributed to the crisis.",
    "A failure to shut off power and provide adequate water and infrastructure for fire hydrants contributed to the crisis.",
    "Making it hard for communities to clear overgrown dry vegetation prevents the creation of defensible space for homes."
```
